prestazioni: Engine swap to a **6G74 3.5L V6 (60° DOHC 24V)** with forged internals (JE Pistons 9.5:1 compression, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings) and a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 58mm compressor wheel) running 22 psi on E85 fuel. Supporting mods include a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU**, **Injector Dynamics ID1300X injectors**, and a **PWR radiator with dual 12" SPAL fans** for thermal management.

Full **Mitsubishi EVO VIII MR** drivetrain conversion, including a **PPG 6-speed manual transmission (F5M42)** with a **OS Giken twin-plate clutch**, **Cusco 2-way LSD**, and **Driveshaft Shop 3.5" aluminum driveshaft**. Suspension is upgraded to **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valved for the Magna TE/KE chassis) with **SuperPro poly bushings** and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)** for chassis rigidity.

Forced induction system includes a **Turbonetics Godzilla wastegate (44mm, external)**, **Tial MV-R blow-off valve**, and a **custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust** with a **Bosal 304-grade downpipe** and **MagnaFlow 76mm mufflers**. Fuel system upgrades feature a **Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump**, **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank**, and **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor** for precise AFR monitoring.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Magna TE/KE widebody kit** (custom fiberglass overfenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with **carbon fiber hood (Seibon)** and **rear diffuser (VIS Racing)**. Paint scheme is **PPG Mitsubishi Sonic Yellow** with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap accents** on the roof and pillars.

**Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +38 (front) and 18x10.5 +45 (rear)** wheels wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)**. Brake system includes **AP Racing 6-piston front calipers (356mm rotors)** and **4-piston rear calipers (330mm rotors)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge braided stainless steel lines**.

**Custom interior** featuring **Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm)**, and **Defi BF gauges (boost, oil pressure, wideband)** mounted on a **custom A-pillar pod**. Roll cage is a **Custom Cages bolt-in 8-point chromoly** with **Sparco harness bar** for rigidity.
